sizing_rule.note: Cap active equity percentage at upper limit = 1 / largest_portfolio_component_correlation when prefiltered optimal f exceeds this leverage-adjusted threshold. In this example, 1/1.25 = 0.8 acts as the ceiling.

source_rule_text: When the prefiltered optimal f exceeds the upper limit of 0.8 (calculated as 1 divided by the portfolio's largest component correlation of 1.25), cap the active equity percentage at 0.8 to avoid excessive leverage.
